Hi all,

  please review this change to move the name `NoteStartOfMarkHRClosure` out of the global namespace.

I decided to move it as a local class into the associated task, but there are more options I could agree with.

At the same time I moved the one-liner methods that were outside of the Task class since it just seems to be unnecessary.

Testing: gha

Thanks,
  Thomas
